detection_notes.ladder_marker_present: if the right-upper edge of a character row shows the green-background ladder marker, classify the row as ladder
detection_notes.ladder_marker_absent: if the green-background ladder marker is absent, classify the row as standard
detection_notes.resurrection_marker_present: if the right-upper edge of a character row shows the gold-background X marker, classify the row as resurrection
detection_notes.resurrection_marker_absent: if the gold-background X marker is absent, classify the row as rotw
